subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou seest me gazing toward the horizon of Thy grace and awaiting the wonders of Thy bounty. I beseech Thee by Thy Most Great Signs and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب ترانی ناظرا الی افق فضلک و منتظرا بدایع جودک اسئلک بایاتک الکبری و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
